words.example_kr: 그 사람은 항상 야심찬 목표를 세워.
words.example_en: She always sets pretty ambitious goals.

words.example_kr: 성공했다고 저렇게 오만하게 굴 필요는 없잖아.
words.example_en: He doesn't need to act so arrogant just because he succeeded.
Even after all that success, he's still humble.

words.example_kr: 돈 문제에 있어서는 좀 더 신중해야 해.
words.example_en: You should be more cautious when it comes to money.
I'm pretty skeptical about that rumor.

words.example_kr: 몇 번을 거절당해도 끈질기게 다시 물어봤어.
words.example_en: He kept asking persistently even after being rejected several times.

words.example_kr: 그 사람은 뭘 하든 별로 관심이 없어 보여.
words.example_en: He seems pretty indifferent to whatever we do.
I'm still resentful about being ignored like that.

words.example_kr: 그 사람 대답이 너무 애매해서 이해가 안 돼.
words.example_en: His answer was so ambiguous that I couldn't understand it.

words.example_kr: 이 상황에서는 그 결과가 거의 불가피했어.
words.example_en: The outcome was almost inevitable given the situation.
That policy has been controversial from the start.

words.example_kr: 이 부분은 앞에서 이미 말한 거라 중복돼.
words.example_en: This part is redundant since it was already covered earlier.

words.example_kr: 네 걱정은 충분히 정당한 것 같아.
words.example_en: Your concern seems perfectly legitimate.

words.example_kr: 그 사람이랑은 대화가 좀 피상적인 느낌이야.
words.example_en: Conversations with him always feel a bit superficial.
That apology felt genuine to me.
There was a subtle change in his expression.

words.example_kr: 이 서류 작업이 너무 지루하고 힘들어.
words.example_en: This paperwork is so tedious.
That explanation sounds fairly plausible.

words.example_kr: 우리는 서로 좋은 감정이 있는 것 같아.
words.example_en: I think we have mutual feelings for each other.

words.example_kr: 그런 얘기를 하면 좀 약해 보일까 봐 걱정돼.
words.example_en: I worry that sharing that would make me look vulnerable.
There's so much information that it feels overwhelming.

words.example_kr: 이 일정은 정말 진 빠지게 힘들어.
words.example_en: This schedule is really exhausting.

words.example_kr: 이번 프로젝트는 요구 사항이 너무 많아.
words.example_en: This project has been really demanding.
Driving that recklessly is dangerous.

words.example_kr: 요즘 세상에 좀 냉소적이 되는 것 같아.
words.example_en: I've been getting a bit cynical about things lately.

words.example_kr: 힘든 일을 겪고도 정말 잘 이겨내더라.
words.example_en: She's really resilient after everything she's been through.

words.example_kr: 그 사람은 항상 다른 사람 입장을 배려해.
words.example_en: He's always so compassionate toward others.

words.example_kr: 이 문제는 좀 더 외교적인 접근이 필요해.
words.example_en: This issue needs a more diplomatic approach.
She's meticulous about checking everything.
